description_long: This stretcher features a sturdy metal frame with a scissor-lift mechanism, allowing for adjustable height. The top surface is covered with a bright red mattress pad, providing comfort for patients during transport. Four caster wheels are attached to the base, enabling smooth mobility across various surfaces. Side rails run along the length of the stretcher, offering safety and preventing accidental falls. At both ends, there are prominent handles for manual maneuvering and lifting. The overall design is functional and robust, suitable for emergency or hospital use in urban environments.
description: A robust stretcher with a red mattress pad, metal frame, side rails, wheels, and handles for safe patient transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red mattress pad, end handles, and two visible wheels.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the full length of the stretcher, side rails, scissor-lift frame, and all four wheels.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the handle, mattress pad, and wheels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side rails, scissor-lift frame, and wheels from the other side.
